'''Tyneir Renz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] field operative for the [[Alliance Army/Legends|Alliance Army]] and was once a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|final years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A veteran of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Jedi Renz survived the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] and went on to become a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the years leading up to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
A native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jiaan]], Tyneir Renz was discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at a young age and was sent to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]]. Studying at the [[Jedi academy|Temple's academy]], Renz went onto train one-on-one with a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] before passing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Pursuing independent studies as a [[Jedi Consular]], Renz enjoyed the study of [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeology]] and [[Sentientologist|anthropology]] as a [[Jedi Researcher|researcher]]. Despite his loyalty and sense of duty to the Order, Renz violated the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]] and the will of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] by marrying and fathering two children in secret; a son and a daughter named [[Padija Anjeri]].<ref name="J12" />

When the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] erupted into full-scale [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]], Renz reported to Coruscant and took up the rank of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] within the newly formed [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Leading troops in battle, Renz confronted the leader of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] in [[Battle of Parein II 4/Legends|battle]] on [[Parein II 4/Legends|Parein II 4]]. Mounted on his [[Tsmeu-6 personal wheel bike|wheel bike]], Grievous conducted a full frontal assault against Renz and two other Jedi; [[Valin Draco]] and [[Sannen/Legends|Sannen]]. While Sannen was killed and Draco left for dead, Renz managed to limp away from the battle defeated but still alive.<ref name="The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/86/indexp2.html|text=The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War|int=The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War}}</ref>

When the Clone Wars ended abruptly with the dissolution of both the Republic and the Confederacy and the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Renz managed to escape execution at the hands of the Grand Army, who had been ordered by the duplicitous [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the Republic to [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|destroy]] all Jedi. The Chancellor, in fact the mysterious [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], had the Temple on Coruscant razed and all Jedi hunted to near extinction. Avoiding detection, Renz rendezvoused with his family on Jiaan briefly before fleeing an Imperial blockade. While he had hoped his family would be safe if they remained on Jiaan, the Empire invaded the world and Renz' family was killed in the fighting there, excluding his daughter who he managed to rescue. Sending his daughter Padija to live with her in-laws on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], the girl matured into an educated scholar, studying at the [[University of Alderaan/Legends|University of Alderaan]] the field in which her father excelled: archaeology.<ref name="J12" />

As opposition to the Empire's reign grew stronger, Renz joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], a loose confederation that hoped to overthrow the Empire and return to democracy. On a mission as a field operative for the Alliance, the Force reunited father and daughter who eventually went on to journey the galaxy in search of relics stolen by the Imperials. Carrying a concealed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] he had crafted before the Clone Wars, Renz protected his daughter as much as he could so as to spare the two any more time apart. On a mission to recover a pair of crystallite skulls for the [[Nercathi clan|Nercathi]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] clan, the pair managed to garner support for the Alliance in thanks for recovering the artifacts.<ref name="J12" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tyneir Renz was considered by [[Abel G. Peña]] to use as [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] Jedi Master, but ultimately he went with [[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]].<ref name="tfn">{{JCFCite|url=posts/20023080|board=Literature|thread=Kyle Katarn's Tale (Dark Forces Articles by Abel & Jason)|user=[[Abel G. Peña|Halagad_Ventor]]|date=2005-06-01|time=1:26 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200801144548/https://web.archive.org/screenshot/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/kyle-katarns-tale-dark-forces-articles-by-abel-jason.19114424/page-13}}</ref>
